description: Letter or letters in Judaeo-Arabic. At the top of recto, probably requesting letters from the addressee, which are "as if I saw your face." The rest is mostly too faded to read. At the bottom, possibly in a different hand, refers to two dinars sent by way of ḥawāla (אלי אוחלתהא); and Abū ʿUmar. The portion on verso mentions having sent the addressee two letters, one with [...] and the other with Bū ʿImrān b. Ghulayb.
